"vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "When cloning an issue originating from a Project other than the current one, the clone form (bug_report_page.php) prepends the source Project name before the category selector without proper escaping, allowing an attacker able to to inject HTML if they can set the Project's name (which typically requires *manager* or *administrator* access level).


### Impact
Cross-site scripting (XSS).
This is mitigated by Content Security Policy which restricts scripts execution.

### Patches
- df22697ae497ddd93f3d9132fdf4979db8d081cd

### Workarounds
Make sure Project names do not contain any HTML tags.

### Credits
Thanks to Vishal Shukla for discovering and responsibly reporting the issue.

The vulnerability was also identified and independently reported by @siunam321 (Tang Cheuk Hei), prior to this Advisory's publication.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00444, "percentile": 0.35572}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:32:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34463"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T22:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:32:11Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/df22697ae497ddd93f3d9132fdf4979db8d081cd", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=36986", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34463", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT is Vulnerable to Stored HTML Injection/XSS in Clone Issue Form", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:12:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fvjf-68wh-rwp2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MantisBT is Vulnerable to Stored HTML Injection/XSS in Clone Issue Form
